summary: Backend voice regression tests passed for valid audio uploads and voice-context chat. Frontend Voice-screen regression could not be fully validated because Expo web preview repeatedly disconnected/not-responding during this run.

critical.issue: Malformed/empty upload cases return HTTP 500 with detail '400: Audio file is required' because raised HTTPException(400) is caught by broad exception handler and rethrown as 500.

integration_issues.flow: Home -> Voice tab and direct /voice route
integration_issues.issue: Could not complete Voice UI flow checks in this iteration because preview repeatedly showed 'The preview environment is not responding' and Metro disconnected events.

react_native_issues.issue: Frequent Metro disconnect and non-responsive preview interrupted mobile-web interaction testing.

action_items: Backend: preserve original HTTPException status codes in /api/voice/transcribe (do not wrap known 4xx into 500).
Frontend: fallback currently retries /api/voice/process only on 422; consider extending retry to selected 4xx/5xx upload failures that are recoverable.
Infra/app runtime: investigate Expo tunnel/Metro instability causing intermittent non-responsive preview during Voice-screen tests.
Add stable testID to tab bar items (including Voice) to reduce flaky text-based navigation in automation.
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceScreen fallback logic is present: it first posts FormData field 'audio' to /api/voice/transcribe and retries with field 'file' to /api/voice/process on 422.
In backend transcribe_voice, raising HTTPException(400) for missing upload is overridden by generic except and returned as 500, which can bypass frontend 422-only fallback handling.
Male-voice tuning is heuristic and depends on available OS voices; behavior can vary by device/browser even with current preference logic.

success_rate.backend: 83% (5/5 targeted pytest checks passed; 1 additional manual malformed-input check found error-status regression)
success_rate.frontend: 40% (basic load passed; core Voice interactions blocked by preview instability in this run)

seed_data_creation: Temporary TEST_ reminder tasks were created by regression tests and cleaned up in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL and backend APIs were reachable. Valid-audio voice endpoints and chat fast-path tests passed via pytest. UI automation hit repeated non-responsive/Metro disconnect states when trying to validate Voice tab and /voice route. Mic recording itself could not be reliably simulated in this unstable preview cycle.
rca_of_issue: RCA: /api/voice/transcribe wraps all exceptions in a generic catch and rethrows HTTP 500. Repro: POST /api/voice/transcribe with JSON or empty multipart; response status becomes 500 and detail contains original 400 message ('Audio file is required'). Mitigation: add explicit `except HTTPException as e: raise e` before broad exception handling.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md; file exists but contains no credentials. No auth flows were in scope.
